headline: Keysight Technologies (KEYS) Appears Attractive Following Recent Pullback
summary: Keysight Technologies Inc. (NYSE:KEYS) is one of the 7 best electronic equipment stocks to buy according to hedge funds. As of the April 10 close, consensus sentiment around Keysight Technologies Inc. (NYSE:KEYS) remained strongly bullish. The stock was assigned Buy ratings by 9 of the 11 analysts who provided coverage, along with 2 Hold calls. […]
